summary: Well‑balanced audio with a slightly cloudy start that improves into an almost flawless performance.
review: The reviewer notes the recording is pretty well balanced, though a little cloudy in places, indicating decent technical quality. Musically the show begins "standard" but builds momentum and becomes nearly a five‑star experience by the end of the set.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it rates the show 4 stars and praises the audio balance; this suggests a good performance with solid recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audio described as pretty well balanced with slight cloudiness; no major flaws or dropouts mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Starts standard then improves steadily, approaching a near‑perfect performance.
